moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with the men's and women's singles finals approaching on the final weekend (July 11th-12th).

angles.name: General Sport
angles.copy: Centre Court drama, strawberries and cream. Wimbledon is building to a thrilling climax this week!

angles.name: London Local
angles.copy: The buzz around SW19 is electric! Who are you backing to lift the trophy at Wimbledon this weekend?

moments.title: England vs India T20 Series Continues
moments.blurb: England's Vitality IT20 series against India continues this week with matches on July 4th, 7th, 9th, and 11th.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: Big week for England cricket! The T20 series against India heats up with four crucial matches. Who's tuning in?

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Harry Brook's side faces a tough test as the Vitality IT20 series against India rolls on. Can they dominate?

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic cycling race, Tour de France, begins its 113th edition in Barcelona, Spain, on Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Grand Depart
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels is back! The Tour de France begins this Saturday in Barcelona. Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling.

angles.name: Cycling Buzz
angles.copy: Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey? The Tour de France Grand Départ is just two days away!

moments.title: New Official Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated on Friday, July 4th, revealing the new number one and top movers of the week.

angles.name: Chart Prediction
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official Singles Chart! Who do you think will be crowned number one this week?

angles.name: Weekend Listen
angles.copy: Tune in tomorrow to find out the UK's new number one! What's your favourite track in the charts right now?

moments.title: Happy 41st Ashley Tisdale!
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, known for her roles in 'High School Musical' and 'The Suite Life of Zack & Cody', celebrates her 41st birthday today, July 2nd.

angles.name: Pop Culture Throwback
angles.copy: From East High to pop stardom! Happy 41st birthday to the one and only Ashley Tisdale today. What's your favourite Sharpay moment?

angles.name: Music & TV
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 41st birthday to actress and singer Ashley Tisdale! Still belting out 'Fabulous' at the top of our lungs.

moments.title: Happy 51st 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III) turns 51 on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the legend that is 50 Cent on Monday. What's his ultimate track?

angles.name: Throwback Bangers
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate 50 Cent's 51st on Monday! Still got 'In Da Club' on repeat? We definitely do.

moments.title: Happy 86th Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer and peace & love advocate Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Wishing the happiest of 86th birthdays to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track he sang?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: He's still got it! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. A true icon of music history.

moments.title: The Night Manager Season 2 Premieres
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated second season of the BBC's acclaimed spy thriller 'The Night Manager' premieres on July 7th.

angles.name: TV Drama Hype
angles.copy: Get ready for more espionage and intrigue! The Night Manager Season 2 arrives on Tuesday. Who's excited for its return?

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Tom Hiddleston and Olivia Colman are back! Don't miss the premiere of The Night Manager Season 2 this week.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Forecast
moments.blurb: A heatwave is forecast for much of the UK starting July 5th, with temperatures set to soar across many regions.

angles.name: Weather Alert
angles.copy: Sun's out, shades on! A heatwave is heading our way from Sunday, with temperatures climbing. Stay safe and hydrated!

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Devon, get ready for some serious sunshine! Temperatures are set to soar from Sunday. What are your heatwave essentials?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the islanders navigating new relationships and challenges as the final weeks approach.

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Did you catch last night's Love Island? The drama is absolutely POPPING OFF as we head towards the grand finale!

angles.name: Evening Tune-in
angles.copy: What twists will the villa bring tonight? Get ready for another dose of Love Island UK on ITV2 and ITVX.

moments.title: Happy 62nd Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and grunge icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: A true rock 'n' roll force! Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to the incredible Courtney Love on Thursday. What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: The queen of grunge turns 62 this week! Celebrate Courtney Love's birthday with us on Thursday by blasting some Hole!

moments.title: Scottish Schools on Summer Break
moments.blurb: Schools across Scotland are now on their summer holidays, kicking off the long-awaited break for students and families.

angles.name: Holiday Start
angles.copy: YAS! Many schools across Scotland are officially on summer holidays! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Scotland! Keep us company on the radio for all your holiday vibes and tunes.
